name: Salmon in Aioli Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a food processor, combine eggs, Dijon mustard, salt, and lemon juice.
3. Gradually add vegetable oil and olive oil with the machine running.
4. Blend in minced garlic, pepper, and Tabasco sauce.
5. Check seasoning and adjust with extra lemon juice if desired.
6. Spread half of the aioli sauce mixture in a shallow baking dish (7 x 12 inches).
7. Place salmon fillets on top of the sauce.
8. Pour dry white wine over the fish.
9. Cover the remaining surface area with the rest of the aioli sauce.
10. Alternate slices of avocado and tomato on top.
11. Bake for approximately 20 minutes.
